# backend/ml/reference/recommendation_lifecycle.py
# auto-generated explainer · 2026-06-12T10:01:57Z

## Purpose
INSUR reference: recommendation lifecycle with content + CF + hybrid comparison.

Per §64.22 — every dept needs a recommender; this is the reference template.

Algorithms compared on the same synthetic-but-realistic user × item matrix:

  1. Popularity baseline           (always recommend most-popular items)
  2. Content-based                 (item-feature cosine similarity)
  3. Collaborative filtering       (ALS-style matrix factorization)
  4. Hybrid (content + CF)         (weighted blend)

Metrics per algorithm:
  - Precision@k / Recall@k / nDCG@k / MAP@k (k=10)
  - Diversity (intra-list, avg pairwise distance)
  - Novelty (1 - mean log-popularity of recommended items)
  - Latency p95 per user

Synthetic dataset structure:
  N=300 users, M=80 items, ~12 latent factors injected.
  Train/test split: held-out 20% of each user's interactions for eval.

Artifacts: data/evaluation/<dept>/<pipeline>/<run_id>/manifest.json + plots/

## Imports
- from `__future__` import annotations
- from `_` import json
- from `_` import logging
- from `_` import time
- from `_` import uuid
- from `dataclasses` import asdict, dataclass, field
- from `pathlib` import Path
- from `typing` import Any
- from `_` import matplotlib
- from `_` import matplotlib.pyplot

## Inputs
- CLI args: --dept, --pipeline, --n-users, --n-items, --top-k, --seed, --artifacts-root

## Process
### Classes
- `RecoManifest`: (no docstring)
- `PopularityReco`: (no docstring)
- `ContentReco`: (no docstring)
- `CollabReco`: (no docstring)
- `HybridReco`: (no docstring)
- `RecoLifecycle`: (no docstring)
### Functions
- `generate_synthetic_data(n_users, n_items, n_factors, interaction_density, seed)`: Generate user × item interaction matrix from latent factors.
- `precision_at_k(recommended, relevant_set, k)`: (no docstring)
- `recall_at_k(recommended, relevant_set, k)`: (no docstring)
- `ndcg_at_k(recommended, relevant_set, k)`: (no docstring)
- `average_precision_at_k(recommended, relevant_set, k)`: (no docstring)
- `diversity(recommended_lists, item_features)`: Intra-list diversity = avg pairwise distance between recommended items.
- `novelty(recommended_lists, popularity)`: Novelty = 1 - mean log-popularity of recommendations (higher = more novel).
- `_main()`: (no docstring)

## Outputs
- Writes files (detected 1 patterns)
- Return values from functions above

## Notable inline comments
- ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
- Synthetic dataset generator
- ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
- Score matrix from dot product
- Sigmoid + threshold → binary interactions
